description: Paired 50-Agent workday screen for the onset of conserved ride-hailing fleet competition before policy experiments.

classification_rules.competition_event: at least one ride-hailing capacity failure in the seed-weather run
classification_rules.collapse_event: at least one final transport_unmet activity after fallback
classification_rules.candidate_rule: highest fleet total with stable competition and below the collapse seed-share threshold

scope_notes: All supply levels within a seed use identical Agents, activities, OD, weather and random priorities.
Vehicle maps are explicit scenario assumptions and are not calibrated Shanghai fleet counts.
Fleet levels are spatially nested: every lower-supply pool is formed only by removing vehicles from the next higher pool.
The candidate rule is fixed before observing results and is a mechanism screen, not an estimated real-world optimum.
